ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the item belongs to */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the size chart belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit used (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for the size chart (e.g., US, EU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement for the size */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement for the size */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement for the size */,
  "sleeves" REAL /* Sleeves measurement for the size */,
  "dress_shirt_size" REAL /* Dress shirt size measurement for the size */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement for the size */,
  "neck" REAL /* Neck measurement for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the inventory level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales staff, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the item */,
  "date_range" TEXT /* Date range for the analytics (e.g., '2023-01-01 to 2023-01-31') */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)
